response:
Sec. 1  
the first word of each sentence should be the word original.  
original task is to decompose a complex system prompt into four independent modules.  
each module must be self-contained and clear.  
the goal is to ensure that all constraints are met and that the final response is complete.  

Sec. 2  
the core task is to break down the original prompt into its essential components.  
this involves identifying the main subject, constraints, and required output.  
the decomposition must be done in a way that each module addresses a distinct aspect of the task.  

Sec. 3  
the first module focuses on identifying the main subject of the original prompt.  
this includes extracting the primary focus and ensuring clarity in the decomposition.  

Sec. 4  
the second module addresses the constraints of the original prompt.  
this involves verifying that all given constraints are explicitly addressed in each module.  

Sec. 5  
the third module focuses on the required output of the task.  
this includes ensuring that the final response meets all the specified formatting and content requirements.  

Sec. 6  
the fourth module ensures that the decomposition is complete and adheres to all constraints.  
this involves checking that all modules are self-contained and that the final response is coherent.  

Sec. 7  
the final response must start and end with the same word.  
the phrase "the pen is mightier than sword" must be repeated exactly twice.  
all lowercase words should appear at most three times.  
the response must be under 36 sentences long.
